# neon_branch_masking_rules (Data Source)

Retrieves masking rules for a Neon branch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_branch_masking_rules" "example" {
  project_id = "my-project-id"
  branch_id  = "br-example-001"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `masking_rules` (Attributes List) List of masking rules for the branch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--masking_rules))

<a id="nestedatt--masking_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `masking_rules`

Read-Only:

- `column_name` (String) The name of the column to be masked.
- `database_name` (String) The name of the database containing the table to be masked.
- `masking_function` (String) The PostgreSQL Anonymizer masking function applied.
- `masking_value` (String) A literal value set on the column when masking.
- `schema_name` (String) The name of the schema containing the table to be masked.
- `table_name` (String) The name of the table containing the column to be masked.
